title: Getting started with Khan Academy and mastery learning
description: A check for understanding of the Getting to know Khan Academy lesson.
topic_path: Getting started with Khan Academy and mastery learning
Getting started with Khan Academy and mastery learning

hints: Khan Academy's mission is to provide a free, world-class education to anyone, anywhere.

choices.content: To provide education for all students.
To provide a free, world-class education for anyone, anywhere.

assessment_items.question_content:
**To provide a free, world-class education to anyone, anywhere is Khan Academy's _______ **.

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Khan Academy's **mission** is to provide a free, world-class education to anyone, anywhere.
Khan Academy's mission is **to provide a free, world-class education to anyone, anywhere**.

choices.content: to provide great tools for students
to provide a free, world-class education for anyone, anywhere

assessment_items.question_content:
Khan Academy is currently available in over 190 countries worldwide.

**True or false.**

[[☃ dropdown 1]]
hints: **True.** Khan Academy is currently available in over 190 countries worldwide.

assessment_items.question_content:
Khan Academy is currently available only in English, Spanish, and Brazilian Portuguese.

**True or false.**

[[☃ dropdown 1]]
hints: **False.** Khan Academy is currently available in over 40 languages.

assessment_items.question_content:
Khan Academy is currently available in over 40 languages.

**True or false.**

[[☃ dropdown 1]]
hints: **True.** Khan Academy is currently available in over 40 languages.

assessment_items.question_content:
Khan Academy is currently available only in the United States.

**True or false.**

[[☃ dropdown 1]]
hints: **False.** Khan Academy is available in over 190 countries worldwide.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Fill in the blanks.**

At Khan Academy, we are striving to create [[☃ dropdown 2]], [[☃ dropdown 1]] learning that transforms students' mindsets.
hints: At Khan Academy, we are striving to create **personalized**, **mastery-based** learning that transforms students' mindsets.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Fill in the blank.**

Khan Academy is  [[☃ dropdown 1]] so if a student needs more practice on a given skill, they can have it.
hints: Khan Academy is **self-paced** so if a student needs more practice on a given skill, they can have it.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Fill in the blank.**

At Khan Academy we believe there's [[☃ dropdown 1]] of ways you can change your classroom to be more mastery-based.
hints: At Khan Academy we believe there's a **spectrum** of ways you can change your classroom to be more mastery-based.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Khan Academy has content in which subject areas?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Khan Academy has content in **Math**, **Science**, **Test Prep**, **Computer programming** and more.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Khan Academy has content in which grade levels?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Khan Academy has content for grades K-14 along with test prep for exams like the SAT, LSAT and Praxis Core.

assessment_items.question_content:
**True or false: Khan Academy focuses only on math content.**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Fill in the blanks.** 

Mastery learning is built on [[☃ dropdown 2]], [[☃ dropdown 1]] learning for students with an emphasis on each student receiving the right content in the right moment. **
hints: Mastery learning is built on **personalized**, **self-paced** learning for students with an emphasis on each student receiving the right content in the right moment.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Fill in the blanks.**

Mastery learning provides students with an opportunity to practice skills [[☃ dropdown 1]] in order to [[☃ dropdown 2]] them before new skills are introduced.
hints: Mastery learning provides students with an opportunity to practice skills **repeatedly** in order to **master** them before new skills are introduced.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Fill in the blanks.**

In a true mastery learning experience, students receive constant [[☃ dropdown 1]] to help them work through challenges and discover [[☃ dropdown 2]] content to work on.
hints: In a true mastery learning experience, students receive constant **feedback** to help them work through challenges and discover **the right** content to work on.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Fill in the blanks.**

The belief that [[☃ dropdown 1]] student can learn if provided with time and the right learning environment is fundamental to [[☃ dropdown 2]] learning.
hints: The belief that **every** student can learn if provided with time and the right learning environment is fundamental to **mastery** learning.
